text.title: Freelance Referral Program Design Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for Freelance Referral Program Design.

step.name: design-incentive
step.action: Set flat $ amount (typically 5-15% of standard price, capped). Document type + amount_usd.

step.name: draft-written-terms
step.action: Draft 1-page written terms doc per referrer; capture signature + date.

step.name: pre-approve-testimonial
step.input: Customer list willing to be named
step.action: Get explicit approval for testimonial template + named customers.

step.name: opt-in-partner-swap
step.action: Send opt-in to each peer; capture explicit consent date.

step.name: publish-program
step.action: Publish private program page; notify referrers + partners; track attribution.
